name: Young Pioneers
description: A 24-week entrepreneurship programme for Classes 8 to 12, built on the Cambridge Global Perspectives framework.

name: VideoGenX
description: AI filmmaking curriculum for Grades 9 to 12 covering storyboarding, prompt-crafting, and post-production with current-gen video tools.

name: Solevit
description: Open-ended SDG-aligned problem-solving challenges across Classes 6 to 12, run as structured design-thinking exercises.

name: STEM, Robotics, AI
description: Hands-on STEM, robotics, and AI curriculum delivered in partnership with IIT Guwahati, covering both teacher training and classroom sessions.

name: Harvard Manage Mentor
description: Harvard leadership and management frameworks adapted for Indian teens, focused on decision-making, team dynamics, and self-management.

name: Talk and Learn
description: English-language development programme for K-12 students, centred on discussion formats, vocabulary targets, and confident speaking.
